name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement for b33p
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement

<!-- b33p is deliberately a focused sound-design tool for short synthesized
     beeps, blips, alarms, and droid chatter — not a full DAW or a
     general-purpose synth. Requests that keep it small and sharp are the
     most likely to land. See TODO.md for the roadmap and scope. -->

## The problem

What are you trying to do that b33p makes hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like b33p to do.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways you've worked around it, or other designs you weighed.

## Scope check

<!-- Is this core to short-synth sound design, or adjacent? How does it fit
     the existing roadmap in TODO.md? -->
